dag-generation.description: CLI command that reads set dependencies from STATE.json/ROADMAP.md and generates .planning/sets/DAG.json

dag-display.signature: node "${RAPID_TOOLS}" dag show -> formatted DAG output
dag-display.description: CLI command that displays the current DAG with execution order and wave grouping

dag-ordered-status.signature: Sets displayed in dependency-wave order in /status output
dag-ordered-status.description: Status command displays sets grouped by DAG waves rather than alphabetically

graph-page-visualization.signature: GET /api/projects/{id}/dag -> { nodes, edges }; React GraphPage with cytoscape-dagre
graph-page-visualization.description: Web dashboard GraphPage renders interactive DAG using cytoscape-dagre with set status coloring

dag-state-sync.description: DAG.json is regenerated atomically whenever set dependencies change (add-set, init roadmap)

no-dag-required.description: Projects without set dependencies work normally -- DAG is optional enhancement, not gate

consistent-order.description: DAG wave ordering matches topological sort output from dag.cjs toposort()

definition.scope: Wires the existing DAG library into the RAPID workflow by adding CLI commands for generation/display, DAG-ordered set display in /status, and a real interactive dependency graph visualization on the web dashboard GraphPage.

tasks.description: Create dag CLI command with generate and show subcommands
tasks.acceptance: dag generate creates DAG.json; dag show prints formatted output

tasks.description: Wire DAG generation into init roadmap step and add-set
tasks.acceptance: DAG.json is created/updated when sets are defined or added

tasks.description: Update /status to display sets in DAG wave order
tasks.acceptance: Sets appear grouped by dependency wave, not alphabetically
GraphPage renders interactive DAG with set nodes colored by status

acceptance: DAG.json generated correctly from set dependencies
CLI dag command works for generation and display
Web dashboard GraphPage renders interactive dependency graph
